series_metadata.series_title: Other States Coverage (OSC) Employer Underwriting Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Underwriting documents including underwriting workbook (Excel), loss runs, declaration pages, experience modification worksheet(s), referral documentation to Zurich, renewal questionnaire, ERM-14, scheduled rating documentation, correspondence with employer or insurance agent.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 15 years per contract, maintain records in the I: Drive. ; Paper: If the record is paper (hard copy), then scan and once image has been verified, shred securely., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
